g.text: without getter: derived field computed inline at every use site
with getter: derived read is a first-class optic
without setter: two separate map passes
The read logic is scattered. No reusable optic path.
fullNameG = to (\p -> firstName p ++ " " ++ lastName p)
Composable: fullNameG . each :: Traversal' Person Char
Two passes; entangled with the container type.
Single pass; composes with any Lens/Traversal path.
